results.note: P6 Dependencies is now [P2, P5], encoding the same-file (phase_verify.py) ordering explicitly; the rationale documents it.
P8 now has Dependencies [P3] and the ordering rationale explicitly calls out that P3 and P8 both edit adversarial_review.py (lines 271 vs 307-325/423).

P1 Tests now uses a real multi-line python3 -c block and correctly states persona_path has no fallback (the fallback lives in persona_for_role), so FileNotFoundError is the expected, consistent outcome.
The self-defeating grep -v '_fail_phase' pipeline is gone; the new test greps '[.]fail_phase\|import.*fail_phase' and expects no hits, plus ImportError/callable checks.

P3 abandoned 'import _fail_phase as fail_phase' (explicitly rejected in the description because it matches import.*fail_phase) in favor of runner._fail_phase(...), which satisfies spec Item 3's verification grep.

P5 Tests now add test_branch_delegation.py that records the argument passed to the monkeypatched get_current_branch and asserts run_verify's lookup received workdir, making the no-cwd bug fix observable.
The .gitignore Files entry is now a definite action: ensure the __pycache__/ line is present, append if missing, create the file if absent.
